title: Device Settings - Settings screen for connected device
scenario: Device Settings screen displays correct tabs (Onboarding, User Guides, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones) when accessed via "..." button with headset connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the Android device.
3. On the Home screen, locate and tap the '...' (more options) button.
4. Observe the Device Settings screen that appears.

5. Verify that the following tabs are displayed (note: tabs may vary by device model): Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones.
expected: The Device Settings screen displays the correct set of tabs for the connected headset model. All applicable tabs (Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones) are present and properly labeled.
